radio_buttons.description: Configuration for the radio button group that displays subscription plan options on the Optimus screen. Each button references a subscription package, and the group controls layout style and purchase behavior.

indicator_alignment.description: Controls the position of the radio circle indicator. Known values: 'right' places it on the right side, 'none' hides it entirely. Any other value or omission defaults to left alignment.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

buttons.description: Array of radio button items representing subscription plan options. Each button is linked to a subscription package via its id.

badge.description: Configuration for a badge label displayed on the radio button, typically used for promotional labels like discounts or special offers.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

color.description: Text color of the badge when the radio button is in the selected state. Resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

deselected_text_color.description: Text color of the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state. Resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

deselected_bg_color.description: Background color of the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state. Resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

variant.description: Badge layout variant. Known value: 'v3' enables the V3 badge style with larger dimensions, adjusted margins, and deselection visibility behavior. Any other value uses the default badge style.

hide_on_deselected_state.description: When true and using the V3 badge variant, the badge is hidden when the radio button is deselected.

text.description: Text content displayed inside the badge label on the radio button.

selected_bg_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

disabled_text_color.description: Text color of the radio button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state. Resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

selected_border_color.description: Border color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

is_selected.description: Whether this radio button is pre-selected by default when the screen loads.

is_enlarged_button_component.description: When true, renders the radio button with a larger height, bolder typography (T6 BOLD for title, T6 SEMI_BOLD for subtitle), and adjusted layout.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the subscription button data model from the 'subscription_button' remote settings. Links this radio button to its package and pricing information.

disabled_background_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state. Resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

border_color.description: Border color of the radio button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state. Resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

gradient_type.description: Gradient style applied to the badge background. Known value: 'gold' applies a gold gradient. Other values are resolved as CascadeGradients names (e.g., 'PRIMARY'). When empty, a solid color background is used instead.

purchase_on_select.description: When true, double-tapping an already-selected radio button triggers the purchase flow directly without requiring a separate CTA button click.

type.description: Determines the visual style of the radio buttons. Known values: 'tiers_style' renders a tiers-style layout; any other value or omission defaults to the standard radio button style.

trial_reminder_toggle.description: Reference to the trial reminder toggle component that lets the user opt in or out of trial reminder notifications. Uses the same toggle component structure as switch_package_toggle.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the trial reminder toggle is displayed. Defaults to false when not specified.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the trial reminder toggle component from the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings.

toggle_placeholder_text.description: Reference to a text component displayed as placeholder content near the toggle area on the Optimus subscription screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the toggle placeholder text is displayed. Defaults to true when not specified.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the toggle placeholder text component from the 'offer_toggle_placeholder_text' remote settings.

content_id.description: Screen variant identifier used to match the correct screen configuration. The value 'default' is used as a fallback when no matching variant is found.

footer.description: Reference to the footer component displayed at the bottom of the Optimus subscription offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the footer component is displayed. Defaults to false when not specified.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the footer component from remote settings.

banner.description: Reference to the banner image component displayed at the top of the Optimus subscription offer screen. The banner supports click actions via deep link hooks.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner component is displayed. Defaults to true when not specified.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the banner component from the 'offer_screen_banners' remote settings.

description.description: Reference to the description text component on the Optimus subscription offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the description component is displayed. Defaults to false when not specified.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the description component from remote settings.

title.description: Reference to the title text component displayed on the Optimus subscription offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the title component is displayed. Defaults to true when not specified.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the title component from the 'offer_screen_titles' remote settings.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

close_button.description: Reference to the close button component that allows the user to dismiss the Optimus subscription offer screen. Supports configurable alignment, margins, and custom icon.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the close button is displayed. Defaults to true when not specified.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the close button component from the 'subscription_screen_close_button' remote settings.

subtitle.description: Reference to the subtitle text component displayed below the title on the Optimus subscription offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the subtitle component is displayed. Defaults to true when not specified.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the subtitle component from the 'offer_screen_subtitles' remote settings.

banner_placeholder.description: Reference to the banner placeholder component that displays text and an optional badge image above or near the banner area on the Optimus subscription screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner placeholder component is displayed. Defaults to true when not specified.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the banner placeholder component from the 'offer_banner_placeholder_text' remote settings.

secondary_button.description: Reference to the secondary button component displayed on the subscription screen. The secondary button can either open a deep link action or launch a tiers half-screen fragment.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the secondary button is displayed. Defaults to true when not specified.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the secondary button component from the 'offer_screen_secondary_button' remote settings.

logo.description: Reference to the logo component displayed on the Optimus subscription offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the logo component is displayed. Defaults to false when not specified.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the logo component from remote settings.

switch_package_toggle.description: Reference to the toggle component that allows the user to switch between subscription packages (e.g., monthly vs yearly). The toggle has enabled and disabled states, each with its own data (title, subtitle, description, package ID) and view styling.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the switch package toggle is displayed. Defaults to true when not specified.

$stable.description: Internal Kotlin Compose compiler stability marker. Not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the toggle component from the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings.
